sub_activities.name: Animal Crossing - Fishing
sub_activities.hazard_description: Being struck by the fishing rod during gameplay
sub_activities.possible_injury: Cuts and bruises on body or face
sub_activities.risk_controls: Provide ample space for the game; brief participants on safe rod handling
sub_activities.additional_controls: Designate a safety buffer zone around the fishing station

sub_activities.name: Animal Crossing - Parcel Delivery
sub_activities.hazard_description: High intensity movement during parcel delivery game
sub_activities.possible_injury: Back and body strains; discomfort on fingers, arms, wrist and neck
sub_activities.risk_controls: Share game instructions before start; provide ample space; limit play duration per session
sub_activities.additional_controls: Encourage participants to warm up before playing

sub_activities.name: Pac-Man Maze Chase
sub_activities.hazard_description: Fall to same level during fast-paced maze navigation
sub_activities.possible_injury: Bodily injury from fall
sub_activities.risk_controls: Require proper footwear; maintain housekeeping of play area; provide ample space
sub_activities.additional_controls: Mark boundaries of play zone clearly

sub_activities.name: Mario Obstacle Course
sub_activities.hazard_description: Overexertion from forceful hand and arm movements
sub_activities.possible_injury: Back and body strains; discomfort on fingers, arms, wrist and neck
sub_activities.risk_controls: Monitor the game actively; share instructions; remind participants to take precautions and stop if feeling pain
sub_activities.additional_controls: Limit consecutive play time to 10 minutes

sub_activities.name: Pokemon Accuracy Throw
sub_activities.hazard_description: Overexertion from repetitive throwing action
sub_activities.possible_injury: Back and body strains; discomfort on fingers, arms, wrist and neck
sub_activities.risk_controls: Monitor the game; share throwing technique instructions; remind participants to stop if discomfort arises
sub_activities.additional_controls: Set maximum number of throws per participant per round

sub_activities.name: Donkey Kong Dodgeball
sub_activities.hazard_description: Overexertion from forceful dodging and throwing movements
sub_activities.possible_injury: Back and body strains; discomfort on fingers, arms, wrist and neck
sub_activities.risk_controls: Monitor game intensity; share instructions and warm-up routine; remind participants to take precautions
sub_activities.additional_controls: Use soft foam balls only; referee to monitor play intensity

sub_activities.name: Pokemon Catch Party - Extra Game
sub_activities.hazard_description: Slip, trip or fall while moving around to collect Pokemon cards
sub_activities.possible_injury: Bodily injury from fall
sub_activities.risk_controls: Place Pokemon cards at convenient and accessible areas; avoid narrow spaces; remind participants to watch their pathway
sub_activities.additional_controls: Ensure adequate lighting in all areas where cards are placed

sub_activities.name: MIG Welding - Steel Frame
sub_activities.hazard_description: Intense UV and IR radiation from welding arc causing eye and skin burns
sub_activities.possible_injury: Eye injury, skin burns, arc eye
sub_activities.risk_controls: Full face shield with shade 10 filter; FR jacket; leather welding gloves; welding curtains around workstation
sub_activities.additional_controls: Barricade area; post warning signs; conduct toolbox talk before starting

sub_activities.name: Welding - Fume Exposure
sub_activities.hazard_description: Inhalation of metal fumes and gases produced during welding
sub_activities.possible_injury: Respiratory irritation, metal fume fever, long-term lung damage
sub_activities.risk_controls: Local exhaust ventilation (LEV) at source; half-face respirator with P2 filter; work in ventilated area
sub_activities.additional_controls: Review SDS for base metal and filler; monitor air quality; no welding in confined space without forced ventilation

sub_activities.name: Welding - Fire Risk
sub_activities.hazard_description: Sparks and spatter from welding igniting nearby flammable materials
sub_activities.possible_injury: Burns, smoke inhalation
sub_activities.risk_controls: Hot work permit required; remove all flammables within 11m radius; CO2 fire extinguisher on standby; fire watch for 30 min after work
sub_activities.additional_controls: Inspect area for hidden flammables; designate a fire watcher

sub_activities.name: Grinding - Metal Sparks
sub_activities.hazard_description: Flying sparks and debris from angle grinding operations
sub_activities.possible_injury: Eye injury, skin lacerations, hearing damage
sub_activities.risk_controls: Safety goggles or face shield; leather gloves; FR clothing; hearing protection; spark deflector guards
sub_activities.additional_controls: Ensure grinding disc is rated for the RPM; inspect disc for cracks before use

sub_activities.name: Acid Handling - HCl Transfer
sub_activities.hazard_description: Skin or eye contact with hydrochloric acid during transfer
sub_activities.possible_injury: Chemical burns to skin and eyes, respiratory irritation
sub_activities.risk_controls: Chemical resistant nitrile gloves; splash goggles; acid-resistant apron; work in fume cupboard
sub_activities.additional_controls: Check SDS before handling; ensure eyewash station is accessible within 10 seconds; buddy system required

sub_activities.name: Solvent Use - Acetone
sub_activities.hazard_description: Ignition of flammable acetone vapours near ignition sources
sub_activities.possible_injury: Burns from flash fire, explosion injuries
sub_activities.risk_controls: No ignition sources in lab; anti-static footwear; grounding strap on containers; store in approved flammable cabinet
sub_activities.additional_controls: Limit quantities to minimum needed; work in ventilated area; have dry powder extinguisher available

sub_activities.name: Chemical Spill Response
sub_activities.hazard_description: Exposure to spilled chemicals during cleanup operations
sub_activities.possible_injury: Skin burns, eye injury, inhalation of vapours
sub_activities.risk_controls: Chemical spill kit available; full PPE during cleanup; ventilate area; absorb with appropriate material
sub_activities.additional_controls: Train all lab users on spill response procedure; post emergency contacts visibly

sub_activities.name: LV Panel Maintenance - 415V
sub_activities.hazard_description: Contact with live 415V conductors during panel maintenance
sub_activities.possible_injury: Electric shock, cardiac arrest, severe burns
sub_activities.risk_controls: Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) procedure; insulated gloves rated 1000V; arc flash suit; verify zero energy with tester
sub_activities.additional_controls: Only authorised electrical workers; two-person rule; permit-to-work required

sub_activities.name: Arc Flash Risk - Switchboard
sub_activities.hazard_description: Arc flash event during energised switchboard operation
sub_activities.possible_injury: Severe burns, blast pressure injury, vision loss
sub_activities.risk_controls: Arc rated PPE (cal/cm2 rated); face shield; maintain safe working distance; use insulated tools only
sub_activities.additional_controls: Conduct arc flash study; post incident energy label on panel; restricted access zone

sub_activities.name: Cable Installation - Overhead
sub_activities.hazard_description: Inadvertent contact with live cables during installation
sub_activities.possible_injury: Electric shock, fall from ladder
sub_activities.risk_controls: De-energise and LOTO before work; rubber insulating mat; insulated tools; non-conductive ladder
sub_activities.additional_controls: Use voltage detector before touching any conductor; wear safety shoes

sub_activities.name: Rooftop Equipment Inspection
sub_activities.hazard_description: Fall from rooftop edge or through fragile roofing material
sub_activities.possible_injury: Fatal or serious injuries from fall
sub_activities.risk_controls: Full body harness with double lanyard; anchor point rated >15kN; guardrails at roof edge; anti-fall netting
sub_activities.additional_controls: Inspect harness before every use; toolbox talk; do not work during adverse weather

sub_activities.name: Scaffold Erection and Dismantling
sub_activities.hazard_description: Workers falling during scaffold erection or dismantling
sub_activities.possible_injury: Severe injuries or fatality from fall
sub_activities.risk_controls: Safety net below scaffold; harness and lanyard during erection; trained scaffold erectors only; scaffold inspection tag
sub_activities.additional_controls: Establish exclusion zone below; daily scaffold inspection; no overloading

sub_activities.name: Dropped Objects - Tools and Materials
sub_activities.hazard_description: Tools or materials dropped from height onto workers below
sub_activities.possible_injury: Head injury, crush injury to workers below
sub_activities.risk_controls: Hard hat mandatory for all below; tool lanyards for all hand tools; toe boards on scaffold platforms; exclusion zone below
sub_activities.additional_controls: Barricade and signpost exclusion zone; use tool bags to transport materials

sub_activities.name: CNC Milling Machine Operation
sub_activities.hazard_description: Contact with rotating spindle or moving table of CNC machine
sub_activities.possible_injury: Crush injury, degloving, amputation
sub_activities.risk_controls: Machine guards in place and interlocked; emergency stop tested before operation; safety shoes; no loose clothing or jewellery
sub_activities.additional_controls: Only trained operators; never bypass guards; LOTO before tool change or maintenance

sub_activities.name: Lathe Operation - Metal Turning
sub_activities.hazard_description: High noise levels from metal cutting on lathe exceeding 85dB
sub_activities.possible_injury: Noise-induced hearing loss
sub_activities.risk_controls: Ear defenders rated 30dB SNR; noise barriers around lathe area; limit exposure duration
sub_activities.additional_controls: Regular hearing tests for frequent users; post noise level signage at machine

sub_activities.name: Forklift Loading - Heavy Pallets
sub_activities.hazard_description: Pedestrian struck by forklift or crushed by falling load
sub_activities.possible_injury: Fatal crush injury, fractures
sub_activities.risk_controls: Forklift exclusion zone for pedestrians; hi-vis vest; hard hat; safety shoes; proximity warning system
sub_activities.additional_controls: Designated pedestrian walkways; forklift operator certified; spotters for blind corners

sub_activities.name: Manual Handling - Boxes >15kg
sub_activities.hazard_description: Musculoskeletal injury from manual lifting of heavy boxes
sub_activities.possible_injury: Back strain, musculoskeletal disorder
sub_activities.risk_controls: Use mechanical lifting aids for loads >15kg; team lift for bulky items; proper lifting technique training
sub_activities.additional_controls: Keep aisles clear; wear safety shoes with ankle support; assess load before lifting

sub_activities.name: Floor Mopping - Wet Surfaces
sub_activities.hazard_description: Slip on wet floor surface during or after mopping
sub_activities.possible_injury: Fall causing fractures, head injury, soft tissue injury
sub_activities.risk_controls: Non-slip footwear; wet floor warning signs placed before mopping; work from exit to entrance; dry mop in sections
sub_activities.additional_controls: Ensure adequate lighting; avoid mopping during peak traffic hours

sub_activities.name: Chemical Cleaning Agent Use
sub_activities.hazard_description: Skin or eye contact with cleaning chemicals such as bleach or caustic cleaners
sub_activities.possible_injury: Chemical burns to skin and eyes; respiratory irritation
sub_activities.risk_controls: Nitrile gloves; safety glasses; ventilate area; do not mix bleach with ammonia or acid-based cleaners
sub_activities.additional_controls: Check SDS before use; use pre-diluted products where possible; store in original labelled containers

sub_activities.name: Pipe Cutting - Oxy-Acetylene
sub_activities.hazard_description: Ignition of flammable materials from oxy-acetylene cutting sparks
sub_activities.possible_injury: Burns, fire damage, explosion injury
sub_activities.risk_controls: Hot work permit issued; remove all flammables within 11m; CO2 extinguisher on standby; designated fire watcher; fire watch 30 min post work
sub_activities.additional_controls: Inspect hoses and regulators before use; no hot work near gas lines; post area as hot work zone

sub_activities.name: Grinding - UV Fume Exposure
sub_activities.hazard_description: Inhalation of metal dust and fumes from cutting and grinding
sub_activities.possible_injury: Respiratory irritation, lung damage from prolonged exposure
sub_activities.risk_controls: Half-face respirator with P3 filter; LEV or forced ventilation; limit exposure duration; work upwind of fume source
sub_activities.additional_controls: Monitor air quality; rotate workers to limit individual exposure; no eating or drinking in work area
